name: stdlib
description: Standard Library plugin providing core host functions.

functions.name: ask
functions.description: Prompt the user with a question and return their input.

functions.name: echo_typed
functions.description: Return the input value unchanged (typed ABI test).

functions.name: fmt
functions.description: Format a string using the given format and arguments.

functions.name: say
functions.description: Output a message to the user.

functions.name: get
functions.description: Retrieve the value of an environment variable by its key.

functions.name: list
functions.description: Return environment variables as a list of { key:String, value:String }.

functions.name: set
functions.description: Set the value of an environment variable by its key.

functions.name: copy
functions.description: Copy a file or directory from one path to another.

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Delete the file at the given path.

functions.name: exists
functions.description: Check if a file exists at the given path.

functions.name: glob
functions.description: Find paths matching one or more glob patterns; accepts a single string or an array of strings. Supports recursive search when enabled.

functions.name: list_dir
functions.description: List the entries in a directory at the given path.

functions.name: make_dir
functions.description: Create a directory at the given path.

functions.name: move
functions.description: Move or rename a file or directory.

functions.name: read
functions.description: Read the content of a file at the given path.

functions.name: stat
functions.description: Get basic metadata for a path: { size:Int, modified:String, is_dir:Bool }.

functions.name: write
functions.description: Write content to a file at the given path. Creates or overwrites the file.

functions.name: exec
functions.description: Run a process and capture { code:Int, stdout:String, stderr:String }.

functions.name: exit
functions.description: Exit the program with the given exit code (default is 0).

functions.name: get_cwd
functions.description: Get the current working directory.

functions.name: set_cwd
functions.description: Set the current working directory to the given path.

functions.name: spawn
functions.description: Spawn a process without waiting for it to finish.

functions.name: which
functions.description: Resolve an executable on PATH and return its full path if found.

functions.name: float
functions.description: Generate a random floating-point number between 0.0 and 1.0.

functions.name: int
functions.description: Generate a random integer between min (inclusive) and max (exclusive).

functions.name: current_time_millis
functions.description: Get the current time in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

functions.name: sleep
functions.description: Pause execution for the specified number of milliseconds.

functions.name: append
functions.description: Append an item to an array and return the new array.

functions.name: empty
functions.description: Create a new empty array.

functions.name: extend
functions.description: Extend an array with items from another array and return the new array.

functions.name: length
functions.description: Return the number of elements in the array.

functions.name: normalize
functions.description: Normalize a path by collapsing components without filesystem access.

functions.name: resolve
functions.description: Resolve a relative path against a base path.

functions.name: relativize
functions.description: Compute a relative path from one path to another.

functions.name: parse
functions.description: Parse JSON text into a typed value (null/bool/int/float/string/array/object).

functions.name: stringify
functions.description: Serialize a typed value into JSON text.

functions.name: trim
functions.description: Trim leading and trailing whitespace.

functions.name: replace
functions.description: Replace all occurrences of a substring with another.
